scripts.cap-sync: npm run sync && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:apk: npm run cap-sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/android-studio/jbr ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../CineVerse-debug.apk && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../www/CineVerse-debug.apk
